summary: Weekly SEO Digest feature fully verified. All backend APIs (GET /api/digest/latest, /archive, /{id}, POST /generate) working. Frontend pages at /weekly-digest, /weekly-digest/archive, /weekly-digest/:digestId load correctly. Share buttons (Tweet, Copy Link), product cards with all required fields, CTAs, SEO meta tags all present.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/digest/latest returns digest with title, intro, 5 products, avg_score, SEO metadata
BACKEND: GET /api/digest/archive returns list of 2 digests with summary fields (no products array)
BACKEND: GET /api/digest/{id} returns specific digest with full products array
BACKEND: GET /api/digest/invalid-id returns 404
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/generate requires authentication (401 without token)
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/generate allows admin access (not 401/403)
BACKEND: Each product has required fields: product_name, rank, launch_score, insight
BACKEND: Digest has max 5 products with category diversity (5 categories in current digest)
FRONTEND: /weekly-digest page loads (public, no auth)
FRONTEND: Weekly Digest shows title 'Top 5 Trending Products — Week of March 16, 2026'
FRONTEND: Weekly Digest shows week label badge
FRONTEND: Weekly Digest shows 'Avg Score: 59.6/100' badge
FRONTEND: Weekly Digest shows intro text (230 chars)
FRONTEND: Tweet share button present with data-testid='share-twitter'
FRONTEND: Copy Link button present with data-testid='share-copy'
FRONTEND: 5 product cards displayed with rank badges (#1-#5)
FRONTEND: Product cards show: name, category badge, trend stage badge, launch score, insight, price, competition level
FRONTEND: 'View Full Analysis' link present on each product card
FRONTEND: Top 'Start Free Trial' CTA button present
FRONTEND: Bottom 'Start Free Trial' CTA in styled card present
FRONTEND: 'View past weekly digests' archive link present
FRONTEND: /weekly-digest/archive page loads with 2 archived digests
FRONTEND: Archive cards show title, avg score, product count
FRONTEND: Archive card click navigates to /weekly-digest/{digestId}
FRONTEND: SEO title present: 'Top 5 Trending Dropshipping Products — Week of March 16, 2026 | TrendScout'
FRONTEND: Meta description present
FRONTEND: OG title and OG description present
FRONTEND: /trending page has 'Weekly Digest' link in nav bar
FRONTEND: Weekly Digest link navigates correctly from /trending

verified_features.verification: Public page loads latest digest with title, intro, avg score, 5 ranked products, share buttons, CTAs
Public page shows list of past digests with title, avg score, product count
Loads specific digest by ID, works from archive navigation
Requires admin authentication, generates top 5 diversified products with insights
Tweet button opens Twitter intent, Copy Link copies URL to clipboard
Page has title, meta description, og:title, og:description, canonical URL
Nav bar has 'Weekly Digest' link at /weekly-digest

seed_data_creation: A weekly digest was pre-generated during development. 2 digests exist in archive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly SEO Digest feature complete: (1) /weekly-digest shows latest digest with 5 products, share buttons, CTAs - PUBLIC page no auth needed. (2) /weekly-digest/archive shows past digests list. (3) /weekly-digest/:digestId loads specific digest. (4) POST /api/digest/generate requires admin auth. (5) /trending has 'Weekly Digest' nav link. Route order is correct: /weekly-digest/archive BEFORE /weekly-digest/:digestId in React Router.
